div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 27px; margin-left: 42px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #1E293B;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1E293B, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 61px; margin-left: 42px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #475569;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#475569, #9ba7b8); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: React → Investigate → Learn · read-only data fan-out · learning-loop feedback

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(224, 231, 255), rgb(31, 38, 58)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(99, 102, 241), rgb(130, 133, 252));
